channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physicists created a tiny universe where time emerged without a clock
item.description: What if time doesn't actually exist until something changes? Scientists at the University of Birmingham created a tiny "mini universe" using 24,000 ul...

item.title: Scientists just debunked a dangerous baby rattlesnake myth
item.description: A new study debunks the long-standing claim that baby rattlesnakes are more dangerous than adults. Researchers found that young rattlesnakes can contr...

item.title: Europe's most active volcano may have a secret origin
item.description: Mount Etna has long puzzled geologists because it does not fit any of the three classic volcano formation models. A new study suggests it may...

item.title: The galaxy's coldest 'stars' may actually be alien megastructures
item.description: Scientists have identified new clues that could help astronomers detect one of the most famous hypothetical alien megastructures: a Dyson sphere. The st...
